violations.text: Chicken was observed thawing in the prep sink with out running water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door freezer. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Prep Unit was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment must have prep unit repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The cutting board on the back prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The establishment did not have hot water. Establishment must have running hot and cold water. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The outside receptacle area was observed with an excess of debris. Outside refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
